# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default-mesh-destinationrule
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: mesh-default-virtualservice
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: all-namespaces-destinationrule
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: "*.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: all-services-virtualservice
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.svc.cluster.local"
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: "*.svc.cluster.local"
